title: Affine interpolation commutes with scalar multiplication

source.citation: Alfio Quarteroni, Riccardo Sacco, and Fausto Saleri, Numerical Mathematics, 2nd ed., Springer, 2007, Ch. 8 (Polynomial Interpolation).
source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: Affine interpolation of scalar-multiplied endpoint data equals the scalar multiple of the affine interpolant.
assumptions: endpoint values y0 and y1 are real

declarations.name: affineInterp
declarations.statement: def affineInterp (theta y0 y1 : Real) : Real := (1 - theta) * y0 + theta * y1

declarations.name: affineInterp_smul
declarations.statement: theorem affineInterp_smul (theta c y0 y1 : Real) : affineInterp theta (c * y0) (c * y1) = c * affineInterp theta y0 y1

tasks.input: Translate the interpolation theorem `affineInterp_smul` into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem affineInterp_smul (theta c y0 y1 : Real) : affineInterp theta (c * y0) (c * y1) = c * affineInterp theta y0 y1

tasks.input: Identify the main algebraic or order lemma needed for the interpolation proof.
